nodes.context: Illegal organization in Yüksekova district accused of killing 16 people, smuggling drugs and weapons, linked to JITEM and possibly Ergenekon.
Turkish Gendarmerie's intelligence unit, involved in illegal activities; Yüksekova Gang's activities are part of JİTEM activities.
Alleged clandestine organization in Turkey; Yüksekova Gang had possible links to Ergenekon.

edges.evidence_quote: The Yüksekova Gang was an illegal organization ... with apparent links to the Turkish Gendarmerie 's JITEM unit
edges.context: The Yüksekova Gang had apparent links to JITEM.

edges.evidence_quote: The Yüksekova Gang was an illegal organization ... and possible links to the Ergenekon organization.
edges.context: The Yüksekova Gang had possible links to Ergenekon.
